title: The Generative Protocol
note: Every generative process, at every scale and recursion depth, runs this loop. Commitment horizon = 1 (A13): the option space after the next gate passage does not yet exist.

columns.name: Initiation
columns.desc: Remove interference; let the system's coherence recruit attention to its weakest point. Record the locus indexically (“here”), not symbolically.

columns.name: Encounter
columns.desc: Engage actual causal operations at the recruited point. Raw observational records; contact duration matched to scale.

columns.name: Gate Evaluation
columns.desc: Apply R ⊓ G — equivalently, test S ≥ θ. Proceed only on dual passage; otherwise diagnose via the five-layer model and return.

columns.name: Articulation
columns.desc: Name strictly downstream of passage. Test whether the name is recruited ({△}(○)) and operative ({△}[□]) — not merely organizational ({△}{△}).

columns.name: Recursive Closure
columns.desc: Re-evaluate the enlarged whole. State, R-topology and boundaries have shifted; return to Step 1 at whatever scale now recruits.

cards.title: “Here”: the onboarding drop-off
cards.note: Locus recorded indexically (“here”), not symbolically. Attention was captured, not scanned — the weakest coherence point announced itself once interference was removed.

cards.title: Q3 dashboard redesign (executive template)
cards.note: Spec arrived before any encounter — a {△}→{△} trajectory. “Was this ever recruited?” No (○) trace: imposition, the most resistant death mode. Strengthen the living side before removal.

cards.title: Felt wrongness in the query planner
cards.note: Strong pull, no causal landing yet. Beautiful delusion: feels alive, ungrounded. Needs [□]-contact — a profile, a trace, a failing query — before any naming.

cards.title: Legacy schema migration
cards.note: Competent-dead: grounded, executed, unrecruited. Premature closure — the migration spec froze a partial contact; the name closed instead of opening further encounter.

cards.title: Rename `session` → `encounter`
cards.note: Living name: arrived through contact ({△}(○)), and it is operative ({△}[□]) — it opens new diagnostics: every “session” now asks what actually happened in the encounter.

cards.title: Deprecated auth middleware
cards.note: Fossil: “Was this once alive?” — yes; trace of generative origin persists. Diagnose through contact, strengthen the living side first, then minimum dissolution: remove one constraint, wait, sense reorganization.

cards.title: Button haptics at the coherence boundary
cards.note: Micro scale: haptic contact, seconds of duration. S ≈ θ — Zone 2, the phase transition; P(anchored) ≈ 0.5 and unstable. Stay with the encounter; do not plan past it.

cards.title: Incident review that nobody feels
cards.note: Consequences route to dashboards rather than experiencing selves (⤓ₑ, dashboard substitution). The collective gate needs independent indexical capture — “here” landing on the same locus without prior communication.

cards.title: Weekly “what recruited us?” review
cards.note: Re-sensing the enlarged whole: the weakest point has moved, and edges at layer N+1 were created by resolution at N. The graph produced itself through its own operation.

title: The Scheduled Dialectic
note: Contentiousness follows the schedule χ: 0.9 →|π 0.7 →|π 0.5 →|π 0.3. Each phase is a DCGC stage; the moderator (⟹ᵐⁿᵃᵛ¹ ⊗ |ᵍ ⊗ ⟹ᵐᵉᵐ) gates before integration and detects HALT.

columns.name: Explore
columns.desc: Abductive navigation: hypothesis generation by ⟨⦿○ ≈ ⊣○⟩. Selected when S < θ₁.

columns.name: Integrate
columns.desc: Inductive navigation: evidence integration by ⟨⦿□ ⇢ ⊣□⟩. Selected when θ₁ ≤ S < θ₂.

columns.name: Consolidate
columns.desc: Deductive navigation: rule application by ⟨⦿△ ≡ ⊣△⟩. Selected when S ≥ θ₂. Thresholds tighten: τ⁽ᵗ⁺¹⁾ = min(τ⁽ᵗ⁾ + η·π⁽ᵗ⁾, τ_max).

columns.name: Synthesize
columns.desc: Genesis: [□]⎕₁ ⋈ᵈ [□]⎕₂ under adequate mediation gives rise to [□]⎕ₑw — with at least one property present in no parent (A7).

cards.title: “Cache everything at the edge, always.”
cards.note: Hypothesis generated by resemblance to a past win. High contentiousness χ = 0.9: the position resists yielding until incoming arguments anchor (χ⁽ᵗ⁺¹⁾ = χ⁽ᵗ⁾·(1 − β·S_incoming)).

cards.title: “Invalidate on every write — freshness first.”
cards.note: Dialectical pole of u₁: [□]⎕₁ ⋈ᵈ [□]⎕₂. Lower track record → lower normalized weight w = (Γ + ε₀) / Σᵥ(Γᵥ + ε₀).

cards.title: p99 latency traces from the last three incidents
cards.note: Evidence integration: the index points at what actually happened. ↑σ_support (ρ) and ↓σ_disagreement (Jensen–Shannon divergence) are tracked on Σᶜᵒⁿᵛ.

cards.title: Moderator: plateau π flagged on σ_disagreement
cards.note: Relative progress r⁽ᵗ⁾σ < ε_rel persisted for t_persist rounds → πσ. The moderator schedules the phase transition →|π and tightens τ toward convergence.

cards.title: ⋗ᵉ Tiered TTL, tuned by incident memory
cards.note: Emergent genesis (⋗ᵉ): incident-driven tuning is a property present in neither parent — not “cache everything”, not “invalidate always”. Mediation adequacy was sufficient; tension duration and intensity crossed threshold.

cards.title: HALT probe
cards.note: HALT ⟺ plateau persists while the gate passes and quality is sufficient. Bounded expectation: E[t_halt] = O(1/ε) for gated averaging; O(log 1/ε) under contraction.

title: The Resolution Procedure
ref: §29 · Part VII — The Unified Field of Failure
note: A phased procedure that is itself gaming-resistant: someone must experience whether it worked, not merely measure completion. Alignment ∝ experiential_return (ML).

columns.name: Pre-diagnostic
columns.desc: Stakes, meta-rationality (solve / change-game / exit / refuse / wait / restore-experience), preference archaeology, experiential mapping: who experiences each level — where are the dead zones?

columns.name: Diagnostic mapping
columns.desc: Purpose excavation (stated / revealed / structural / latent / experienced), metric archaeology, gaming census to recursion depth ≥ 3, friction inventory.

columns.name: Solution-space mapping
columns.desc: Eliminate failed strategies; enumerate structural interventions; assess the experiential return of each.

columns.name: Structural redesign
columns.desc: Multi-scale alignment, antifragile response, verification integration, exit options, governance, experiential return by design.

columns.name: Implementation
columns.desc: Gall's Law: simplest, smallest, most reversible first. Chesterton's Fence: understand what experience a structure encodes before removing it. Adversarial testing.

columns.name: Evolutionary iteration
columns.desc: Adapt on triggers; define exit conditions; guard the method against checkbox-completion and experiential theatre.

cards.title: Experiential map: who actually feels deploy pain?
cards.note: Map every level of the system to its experiencer. The dead zones — consequences that land on no one — are where feedback-without-interiority takes root.

cards.title: Purpose excavation: the 99.9% uptime KPI
cards.note: Stated purpose: reliability. Revealed purpose: green dashboards. PMG = 1 − correlation(metric, purpose_outcomes) is the space into which optimization pressure leaks. Purpose debt D(t) = ∫ PMG du has been accruing for years.

cards.title: Gaming census ≥ depth 3: the review leaderboard
cards.note: Depth 1: rubber-stamp approvals. Depth 2: splitting PRs to farm count. Depth 3: the anti-gaming linter is now itself optimized (meta-hacking recursion ⟨⟨⟩⟩). Gaming lives in the null space of the representation.

cards.title: On-call feels the alert they wrote
cards.note: Shorten the loop action → consequence → experience → identity → action. A system stays aligned only as long as action reshapes the actor: alignment ∝ experiential_return.

cards.title: The Thursday deploy freeze
cards.note: Before removing the freeze, understand what experience it encodes: it is the fossil of a catastrophic Thursday incident — load-bearing friction, not vestigial. Removal leaves a void with no latent structure to fill it.

cards.title: Alert noise below the felt threshold
cards.note: Exit when the on-call's experienced noise — not the dashboard's — falls below threshold. Guard against experiential theatre: a retro where nobody's identity is at stake is {△} ritual, not (○) contact.
